title: SQLancer alter table add unique gives strange error message
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), value DECIMAL(10,2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD CONSTRAINT unique_name_value UNIQUE (name, value);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table);
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE add UNIQUE constraint on multiple columns
